text:
(In reply to Jordan Gordeev from comment #29)

> … 
> 
> 1. The risk of being unable to boot with disks larger than 2TB 
> should be well documented.
> …

This constraint might be expressed at a 'requirements' page. 

<https://codeberg.org/grahamperrin/freebsd-doc/issues/40>

> FreeBSD 'system requirements' are not documented at the Project site 
> or the documentation portal
